## Topic

What should this note explain?

## Goal

Why is this topic useful, and what should the note help the reader do?

## Requested depth

- short overview
- practical guide
- deep dive

## Must-have sources

List any URLs or primary references that should be included.

## Notes

Any constraints, examples, or edge cases to cover.
